metadata.name: Explore the Boot Process and Select a Boot Target
metadata.description: Update the system default target and use a temporary target from the boot loader
objectives: Update the system default target and use a temporary target from the boot loader

tasks.name: Verify default target is graphical.target
tasks.description: The system default target should be set back to graphical.target after the exercise

checks.description: Check that default target is graphical.target

tasks.success_message: Default target is correctly set to graphical.target
hints: Use 'sudo systemctl set-default graphical.target' to set the default target

tasks.name: Verify default.target symlink exists
tasks.description: The /etc/systemd/system/default.target symlink should point to graphical.target

checks.description: Check default.target symlink points to graphical.target

tasks.failure_message: default.target symlink does not point to graphical.target

tasks.name: Verify graphical.target unit exists
tasks.description: The graphical.target systemd unit should exist on the system

tasks.name: Verify multi-user.target unit exists
tasks.description: The multi-user.target systemd unit should exist on the system
